content.text: Directions: Read the following passage aloud. You will have 30 seconds to prepare and 45 seconds to read.
Part 1. Directions: Read the following passage aloud. You will have 30 seconds to prepare and 45 seconds to read.

gradingInfo.problemInfo:
## Reading Aloud

Listen to the student's recording of the passage and evaluate based on the criteria below.

**Passage text:**

{{passage_text}}
gradingInfo.gradingInfo:
### Scoring Rubric

| Score | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| 5 | **Excellent** - Clear pronunciation, natural intonation, no errors |
| 4 | **Good** - Minor pronunciation errors, mostly natural flow |
| 3 | **Fair** - Some mispronunciations, slightly hesitant |
| 2 | **Poor** - Frequent errors, unnatural pace |
| 1 | **Very Poor** - Difficult to understand, many errors |

### Key Points

- Check for correct pronunciation of difficult words
- Evaluate fluency and natural pauses
- Check word stress and sentence intonation

editableData.description: 朗读短文内容（支持多行）
